message:
feat(core): reservoir sampler for bounded-memory stream sampling (wa-eo0c)

Algorithm R (uniform) and A-ES (weighted) reservoir samplers with
SplitMix64 PRNG, deterministic seeding, serializable stats. Useful for
telemetry downsampling and representative output collection. 24 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
